text.title: Facebook Ads Playbook Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: New DTC ecom account, $300/day target. Warmup: start $150/day, ramp +25% every 3 stable days. Placements: feed + Reels + Marketplace.
example.note: Warmup ramp, native placements, AEM ready, learning-phase forecast meets the 50/week floor.
